jobs.description: Leading network infrastructure support and remote access solutions for enterprise clients.
achievements: Provided network and remote access support for 100+ users
Created procedural documentation and relevant technical reports
Maintained network devices and peripherals ensuring 99% uptime
Identified and resolved complex connectivity issues

jobs.description: Comprehensive hardware and software support for a leading computer solutions provider in Dubai.
achievements: Installed and configured hardware, software, networks, printers and scanners
Diagnosed and resolved complex hardware and software faults
Upgraded and maintained software and hardware systems
Repaired and replaced faulty equipment as necessary
Conducted electrical safety checks on all computer equipment

jobs.description: First-line IT support handling user queries and maintaining detailed incident logs.
achievements: Managed incoming technical support calls and activity reports
Recorded events, problems and resolutions in logs
Suggested effective solutions when system errors occurred
